stock_uncle_insight.date_header: 7/23 法人與主力大戶主要買超股票

buyer_groups.group_title: 1. 外資大戶：狂掃金融ETF與傳產，避險意味濃

stocks.description: 肖年仔，你看這凱基金，外資大戶直接狂掃 3.76 萬張！這擺明就是把金融股當避風港，大盤震盪，錢往哪裡跑？當然是跑去這些穩定的地方，殖利率又不錯，外資在找安全感啦！
0056這種高股息ETF，外資也買了 2.50 萬張，這不是在跟你開玩笑，這是標準的「存股」思維，或者說，在大盤高檔，先買進這些有配息保護的標的，進可攻退可守，很聰明啦！
元大金也被外資買了 2.50 萬張，跟凱基金一樣，金融股就是外資的「定存股」概念，尤其在市場不確定性高的時候，這些金控公司就是資金的避風港，穩穩賺配息，多好！
緯創這檔AI概念股，外資還是持續買超 2.42 萬張，雖然市場對AI股有些雜音，但外資還是看好長線趨勢，可能是在等拉回找買點，或是看好後續的訂單動能，肖年仔，這就是所謂的「鎖碼」啦！
大成鋼這種傳產股，外資也買了 2.39 萬張，這代表外資也在做資產配置，不只看科技股，傳產的低基期、景氣復甦題材，也是他們布局的重點，這叫「雞蛋不要放在同一個籃子裡」！

buyer_groups.group_title: 2. 投信大戶（本土國家隊）：作帳行情啟動，金融股是首選

stocks.description: 投信狂買華南金 1.02 萬張，肖年仔，這就是標準的「作帳行情」啦！季底、年底，投信為了績效，一定會拉抬自己持有的股票，金融股權重高、股性穩，是他們最愛拿來作帳的標的之一。
彰銀也被投信買了 9570 張，跟華南金一樣，都是金控類股，投信這波就是鎖定金融股，一來避險，二來作帳，三來這些股票殖利率也不錯，進可攻退可守，本土國家隊的思維就是這樣啦！
第一金也榜上有名，投信買超 8602 張。你看，前幾名都是金融股，這很明顯就是投信在「抱團取暖」，大家一起買，股價比較容易拉抬，也比較不容易被「倒貨」啦！
興富發這檔營建股，投信也買了 6520 張，這可能跟近期房市回溫，或者有特定的建案題材有關。投信有時候也會去挖這種有特定利基的傳產股，當作是短線的「點火」標的。
統一這檔食品龍頭，投信買了 4687 張，但外資卻在賣。這就是內外資看法不同調的狀況，投信可能看好內需消費復甦，或是統一集團的多元佈局，但外資可能覺得漲多了，先「獲利了結」啦。

buyer_groups.group_title: 3. 內資主力與實戶：短線操作，面板與半導體成焦點

stocks.description: 自營商買超聯電 3213 張，肖年仔，這就是標準的「短線操作」啦！聯電這種大型半導體股，有時候會被自營商拿來做避險，或是看好短線的技術性反彈，但通常不會抱太久，隔日沖的機率很高。
群創也被自營商買了 2833 張，面板股最近有點題材，自營商看到機會就進去「搶短」，這種股票波動大，很適合他們做價差，但肖年仔你可別「黑白買」，這種股票很容易被「割韭菜」的！
富邦科技ETF也被自營商買了 2413 張，這代表自營商在做指數型商品的避險或套利，有時候是為了對沖手上的權證部位，或是單純看好科技股的短線表現，但他們不會傻傻地長期持有啦。
華邦電也被自營商買了 700 張，這檔記憶體股，自營商可能看好記憶體產業的谷底翻揚，或是單純做短線的技術面操作。但肖年仔，這種股票要小心，有時候只是「拉高出貨」的煙霧彈！
興富發這檔營建股，自營商也買了 642 張，跟投信一樣，可能也是看好短線題材。自營商的動作通常比較靈活，哪裡有肉就往哪裡鑽，但跑得也快，你可別傻傻地去「接刀」！

strategies.strategy_title: 策略一：高檔避險與資金避風港（金融、ETF）
strategies.strategy_content: 肖年仔，你看外資跟投信，不約而同地狂掃金融股和高股息ETF，這擺明就是在大盤高檔震盪的時候，把資金撤出高風險板塊，移往這些具有防禦性、波動度較低的標的。國際上加密貨幣市場有公司破產，雖然跟台股直接關係不大，但這種消息會讓大戶更傾向保守，把錢放在金融這種「穩」的資產上，賺配息、求穩定，這就是他們的避險策略啦！

strategies.strategy_title: 策略二：傳產低基期與景氣復甦卡位（鋼鐵、塑化、營建）
strategies.strategy_content: 除了金融，外資也買大成鋼、中鋼、台化這些傳產股，投信也買了興富發、南亞。這代表大戶們在找那些跌無可跌、評價面相對低的標的。在科技股漲多之後，資金會輪動到這些有景氣復甦題材、或是低基期的傳產股，當作是下一波的布局重點。這不是亂買，這是看好產業循環，提前「卡位」啦！

strategies.strategy_title: 策略三：短線題材點火與權證對沖（半導體、面板）
strategies.strategy_content: 自營商買超聯電、群創、華邦電這些半導體和面板股，這很明顯是短線操作。這些股票有時候會因為產業消息、技術面反彈，成為自營商「點火」的標的。他們可能看好短線的價差，或是為了對沖手上的權證部位。肖年仔，這種股票波動大，主力進出快，你可別傻傻地跟著追高，很容易被「隔日沖」倒貨的！

stock_uncle_insight.summary: 肖年仔，今天大戶們的動作很清楚，外資投信抱團取暖，狂掃金融避險兼作帳，傳產低基期也偷偷卡位。自營商則是短線進出，哪裡有肉就往哪裡鑽。總之，市場資金還是偏向保守，但也不放棄找機會，你可別「黑白買」，看清楚主力動向，才不會被「割韭菜」啦！

top_brokerages_analysis.uncle_logic: 高盛這種外資大咖狂買凱基金，這不是在跟你開玩笑，這是真外資的長線布局，看好金融股的穩定性跟殖利率，把錢放在這裡避險，穩穩賺，不求暴衝，只求穩健啦！
凱基台北買聯電，肖年仔，這分點就是著名的「隔日沖」大本營！今天買，明天高機率就「倒貨」給你，他們就是看準短線題材或技術面反彈，賺個價差就跑，你可別傻傻地去追高，小心被套牢！
元大投信買華南金，這就是本土國家隊在「作帳」啦！投信為了美化帳面，會集中火力拉抬自己持有的金融股，這也是為什麼金融股最近這麼強勢的原因之一，他們要讓基金績效好看啦！
摩根大通狂賣漢翔，這就是外資在「獲利了結」或是「避險」啦！漢翔之前漲了一波，現在外資覺得差不多了，先跑為上，把錢抽出來，轉去更穩定的標的，這叫「見好就收」！

english_professor_news.title: Popular crypto firm files for Chapter 11 after token collapse

level1_blind.text:
Movement Labs, the developer behind the Movement blockchain, has filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy protection in the U.S. after months of turmoil triggered by its controversial token launch and a failed effort to revive the project.

Court filings show MVMT Labs filed for Chapter 11 protection in the U.S. Bankruptcy Court for the District of Delaware on July 15.

The company is seeking to restructure under court supervision while continuing operations. Initial hearings have already been held, with creditors required to file claims by Sept. 14.

The bankruptcy follows a turbulent year for the project, which was rocked by allegations surrounding its market-making arrangements during the launch of its MOVE token.

In May 2025, Movement Labs suspended co-founder Rushi Manche after announcing an independent investigation into a market-maker agreement linked to Rentech and Web3Port.

Binance later said the market maker rapidly sold 66 million MOVE tokens, or about 5% of the total supply, contributing to a sharp decline in the token's price. Coinbase also suspended MOVE trading after saying the token no longer met its listing standards.

In June 2026, the project rebranded around a new strategy focused on cross-border payments, stablecoin settlement and financial infrastructure for emerging markets, shifting away from its original Ethereum scaling ambitions. The project also announced token buybacks and investor realignment efforts as part of the overhaul.

Those measures, however, failed to prevent the bankruptcy filing. MOVE has continued to trade near record lows despite the strategic pivot.

english_professor_news.level2_context:
這篇文章描述了一家 cryptocurrency 公司（數位貨幣公司）因為其 token 的崩潰而宣布破產。該公司的破產是由於其 token 的市場創造 arrangements 失敗所導致。
該公司最初的目標是通過 Ethereum 的 scalping 來實現其 vision，但最終該計畫也 failed。
該公司現在正在嘗試重新架構，希望能夠在未來恢復穩定。

這個事件對 cryptocurrency 市場有著重要的影響，表明了 token market 的不穩定性。

level3_translation.sentence: Movement Labs, the developer behind the Movement blockchain, has filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy protection in the U.S. after months of turmoil triggered by its controversial token launch and a failed effort to revive the project.
level3_translation.translation: 運動labs，移動鏈的開發者，已於美國宣布破產，並要求法院進行財務重組。

level3_translation.sentence: Court filings show MVMT Labs filed for Chapter 11 protection in the U.S. Bankruptcy Court for the District of Delaware on July 15.
level3_translation.translation: 法庭文件顯示，運動labs於7月15日在美國第十二巡回法院宣布破產。

level3_translation.sentence: The company is seeking to restructure under court supervision while continuing operations.
level3_translation.translation: 公司正在尋求在法院的監管下進行財務重組，並且 continue 进行營業活動。

level3_translation.sentence: Initial hearings have already been held, with creditors required to file claims by Sept. 14.
level3_translation.translation: 初步聽證會已經完成，creditors 需要在9月14日之前提交申請。

level3_translation.sentence: The bankruptcy follows a turbulent year for the project, which was rocked by allegations surrounding its market-making arrangements during the launch of its MOVE token.
level3_translation.translation: 破產是由於該項目在一年的 turbulence 中受到影響，該項目的市場創造安排在其 MOVE Token 的發行中被指出存在問題。

level3_translation.sentence: In May 2025, Movement Labs suspended co-founder Rushi Manche after announcing an independent investigation into a market-maker agreement linked to Rentech and Web3Port.
level3_translation.translation: 2025年5月，運動labs暫停了其共同創始人Rushi Manche 的工作，並宣布進行了一項獨立調查，關於與Rentech和Web3Port的市場創造安排。

level3_translation.sentence: Binance later said the market maker rapidly sold 66 million MOVE tokens, or about 5% of the total supply, contributing to a sharp decline in the token's price.
level3_translation.translation: Binance後來表示，市場創造 arrangements Rapidly出售了約6.6億枚MOVE Token，占總供應量的5%，導致該Token的價格急劇下跌。

level3_translation.sentence: Coinbase also suspended MOVE trading after saying the token no longer met its listing standards.
level3_translation.translation: Coinbase也暫停了MOVE Token 的交易，表示該Token不再符合其上市標準。

level3_translation.sentence: In June 2026, the project rebranded around a new strategy focused on cross-border payments, stablecoin settlement and financial infrastructure for emerging markets, shifting away from its original Ethereum scaling ambitions.
level3_translation.translation: 2026年6月，該項目重新定位，關注於跨國界的付款、穩定幣的結算和新興市場的金融基礎設施，從而轉移了其原有的以乙太鏈擴大為目的。

level3_translation.sentence: The project also announced token buybacks and investor realignment efforts as part of the overhaul.
level3_translation.translation: 該項目還宣布進行了token 回購和投資人重新配對的工作，作為重組的部分。

level3_translation.sentence: Those measures, however, failed to prevent the bankruptcy filing.
level3_translation.translation: 雖然這些措施 failed 但不能阻止破產的申請。

level3_translation.sentence: MOVE has continued to trade near record lows despite the strategic pivot.
level3_translation.translation: MOVE Token 尽管進行了戰略轉變，但仍在交易價格低至新紀錄水平。

english_professor_news.title: Bitdeer Bitcoin Output Jumps 388% as AI Cloud Utilization Hits 95%
english_professor_news.level1_blind:
Bitdeer Technologies Group (NASDAQ: $BTDR) mined 990 bitcoin in June, extending a sharp production rebound while higher GPU utilization pushed its AI Cloud annualized recurring revenue to approximately $76 million.

Bitcoin (CRYPTO: $BTC) output rose 388% from 203 BTC a year earlier and increased from 921 BTC in May. Self-mining hashrate reached 73.0 EH/s, up from 70.2 EH/s a month earlier, while co-mining capacity climbed to 15.9 EH/s. Total hashrate under management finished June at 86.1 EH/s.

Bitdeer's bitcoin balance moved lower despite the production gain. The company held 150 BTC at month-end, down from 171 in May and 1,502 in June 2025, keeping capital allocation in view as it funds a wider buildout across mining, AI Cloud and colocation infrastructure.

MEXC Reports 7.1 Billion USDT in SpaceX Futures Volume as Q2 Closes the Gap to Wall Street

SBI Group, DigiFT, and Startale Group Advance Tokenized Capital Markets with JPYSC-Powered Settlement and Onchain Dividend Distribution

MEXC Adds Five Ondo Tokenized Stocks Spanning Semiconductors to Power Infrastructure

AI Cloud utilization rose to 95% from 90% in May, with 3,517 of 4,248 deployed GPUs under external subscription. Annualized recurring revenue increased from roughly $69 million, while customer deliveries were completed under a five-year GPU cloud contract following the launch of two NVIDIA (NASDAQ: $NVDA) GB300 NVL72 clusters.

Chief Financial Officer Michael G. Potter said June reflected continued execution across Bitdeer's AI infrastructure platform, pointing to the higher cloud run rate, GB300 deliveries and continued strength across the mining fleet.

level3_translation.sentence: Bitdeer Technologies Group (NASDAQ: $BTDR) mined 990 bitcoin in June, extending a sharp production rebound while higher GPU utilization pushed its AI Cloud annualized recurring revenue to approximately $76 million.
Bitcoin (CRYPTO: $BTC) output rose 388% from 203 BTC a year earlier and increased from 921 BTC in May.
Self-mining hashrate reached 73.0 EH/s, up from 70.2 EH/s a month earlier, while co-mining capacity climbed to 15.9 EH/s.
Bitdeer's bitcoin balance moved lower despite the production gain.

The company held 150 BTC at month-end, down from 171 in May and 1,502 in June 2025, keeping capital allocation in view as it funds a wider buildout across mining, AI Cloud and colocation infrastructure.
MEXC Reports 7.1 Billion USDT in SpaceX Futures Volume as Q2 Closes the Gap to Wall Street
SBI Group, DigiFT, and Startale Group Advance Tokenized Capital Markets with JPYSC-Powered Settlement and Onchain Dividend Distribution
MEXC Adds Five Ondo Tokenized Stocks Spanning Semiconductors to Power Infrastructure
AI Cloud utilization rose to 95% from 90% in May, with 3,517 of 4,248 deployed GPUs under external subscription.

Annualized recurring revenue increased from roughly $69 million, while customer deliveries were completed under a five-year GPU cloud contract following the launch of two NVIDIA (NASDAQ: $NVDA) GB300 NVL72 clusters.

Chief Financial Officer Michael G. Potter said June reflected continued execution across Bitdeer's AI infrastructure platform, pointing to the higher cloud run rate, GB300 deliveries and continued strength across the mining fleet.

english_professor_news.title: Is The Charles Schwab Corporation (SCHW) Trading at a Discount?

level1_blind.text:
Giverny Capital Asset Management, LLC, an investment management company, recently published its second-quarter 2026 investor letter. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. The model portfolio returned 13.70% this quarter, compared to the S&P 500's 15.20% return. YTD, the portfolio gained 5.89%, while the index increased by 10.21%. The long-term link between stock appreciation and earnings growth is strong; Benjamin Graham described the market as a "voting machine" in the short term and a "weighing machine" in the long term. Despite the S&P 500's 10.2% rise in the first half of the year, 210 stocks lost value, indicating market anomalies. High-quality earnings compounders that benefit from AI capabilities are likely to maintain their competitive edge. Recently, the market has increasingly chased momentum. Tech giants are taking advantage of the optimism of investors amid fears of an AI bubble. Despite strong profit margins, reliance on "moonshot" investments raises sustainability concerns. The author recommends investing in both emerging tech leaders and established firms. In addition, please check the Strategy's top five holdings to know its best picks in 2026.

In its Q2 2026 investor letter, Giverny Capital Asset Management highlighted The Charles Schwab Corporation (NYSE:SCHW). The Charles Schwab Corporation (NYSE:SCHW) is a multinational financial services company that provides wealth management, securities brokerage, banking, asset management, custody, and financial advisory services. On July 20, 2026, The Charles Schwab Corporation (NYSE:SCHW) closed at $102.54 per share, reflecting a market capitalization of $178.33 billion. The Charles Schwab Corporation (NYSE:SCHW) posted a one-month return of 10.06%, while its shares gained 7.50% over the past 52 weeks.

Giverny Capital Asset Management stated the following regarding The Charles Schwab Corporation (NYSE:SCHW) in its Q2 2026 investor update:

"Roughly 40% of the Index outperforming the average and 60% underperforming is not so unusual, but two-thirds of that lagging group underperforming by more than 10 percentage points seems like a lot. Even this level of dispersion might make sense if most of the earnings growth in the Index was concentrated in the 200 stocks that were up double digits. This is not the case. We own Index constituents such as The Charles Schwab Corporation (NYSE:SCHW), JP Morgan, Mastercard and Progressive Corp. that continue to grow their earnings per share at healthy rates and in some cases at higher rates than usual, but whose stock prices are lagging.

Schwab, for example, earned $4.87 per share in 2025 and the consensus of Wall Street analysts calls for earnings per share, or EPS, of $7.62 in 2027. That would represent a two year growth rate of 56%, or 25% per year. As of June 30th, the shares were down 8% for the year and trading at $92.27, or 12 times the 2027 EPS estimate. The Index trades for more than 20 times the forward estimate. We added to Schwab during the quarter, making it our third-largest position.

The Charles Schwab Corporation (NYSE:SCHW) is not on our list of 40 Most Popular Stocks Among Hedge Funds Heading Into 2026. According to our database, 101 hedge fund portfolios held The Charles Schwab Corporation (NYSE:SCHW) at the end of the first quarter, compared to 104 in the previous quarter. While we acknowledge the potential of The Charles Schwab Corporation (NYSE:SCHW) as an investment, we believe certain AI stocks offer greater upside potential and carry less downside risk. If you're looking for an extremely undervalued AI stock that also stands to benefit significantly from Trump-era tariffs and the onshoring trend, see our free report on the best short-term AI stock.

In another article, we covered The Charles Schwab Corporation (NYSE:SCHW) and shared the list of top large-cap stocks to invest in at 52-week lows. In addition, please check out our hedge fund investor letters Q2 2026 page for more investor letters from hedge funds and other leading investors.

READ NEXT: 33 Stocks That Should Double in 3 Years and 15 Stocks That Will Make You Rich in 10 Years.

We own Index constituents such as The Charles Schwab Corporation (NYSE:SCHW), JP Morgan, Mastercard and Progressive Corp. that continue to grow their earnings per share at healthy rates and in some cases at higher rates than usual, but whose stock prices are lagging.
Schwab, for example, earned $4.87 per share in 2025 and the consensus of Wall Street analysts calls for earnings per share, or EPS, of $7.62 in 2027.
That would represent a two year growth rate of 56%, or 25% per year.
As of June 30th, the shares were down 8% for the year and trading at $92.27, or 12 times the 2027 EPS estimate.
The Index trades for more than 20 times the forward estimate.
We added to Schwab during the quarter, making it our third-largest position.
The Charles Schwab Corporation (NYSE:SCHW) is not on our list of 40 Most Popular Stocks Among Hedge Funds Heading Into 2026.
According to our database, 101 hedge fund portfolios held The Charles Schwab Corporation (NYSE:SCHW) at the end of the first quarter, compared to 104 in the previous quarter.
While we acknowledge the potential of The Charles Schwab Corporation (NYSE:SCHW) as an investment, we believe certain AI stocks offer greater upside potential and carry less downside risk.

market_linker_insight.market_connection: 在 cryptocurrency 和 finance 的市場中，Movement Labs 的 Chapter 11 bankruptcy protection filing 和 Bitdeer Bitcoin Output 的大幅增加都表明了對於 AI Cloud 和 mining 的強烈需求。這些事件可能與 The Charles Schwab Corporation 的股價下跌有關，因為兩者都涉及到技術和金融的變革，需要適應新的市場情勢和技術趨勢。然而，Giverny Capital Asset Management 的觀點表明，The Charles Schwab Corporation 的股價可能會在短期內受影響，但其長期成長潛力仍然存在。因此，對於這些事件的分析需要考慮到市場的整體趨勢和各個公司的特定情況。
